title: Savory Crumbly Portuguese Chickpea Crumble
description: A savory, crumbly dish inspired by traditional monsoon Portuguese cuisine featuring chickpeas (garbanzo beans), low-sodium-friendly and perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cups canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed
ingredients.notes: Use low sodium or choose plain variety

instructions: In a large bowl, combine chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, cilantro, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Mix well until the mixture is evenly combined. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crumbly.
Remove from oven and serve warm as a snack or side dish.
